an3.108:1.1: “There is no satiation through indulging in three things.
an3.108:1.3: There is no satiation through indulging in sleep.
an3.108:1.4: There is no satiation through indulging in distilled & fermented drinks.
an3.108:1.5: There is no satiation through indulging in the climax of sexual intercourse.
an3.108:1.6: There is no satiation through indulging in these three things.”
